name: Spinach Pesto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Ground pine nuts or walnuts
1/4 cup Pine nuts or walnut pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four ingredients; press on the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of an 8-inch springform pan. Set aside.
2. Position the knife blade in the food processor bowl. Add spinach and the next five ingredients. Top with cover; process until smooth. With the processor running, pour oil through the food chute in a steady stream until the mixture is blended.
3. Beat the cream cheese at high speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add milk and spinach mixture, mixing well.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan. Bake at 300 degrees F for 1 hour or until almost set. Turn off the oven, and partially open the oven door; leave cheesecake in the oven for 1 more hour. Serve immediately, or let cool on a wire rack. Cover and chill. Garnish, if desired, with pine nuts or walnut halves.
